/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libMMPropagation.so -o libMMPropagation.so CMakeFiles/MMPropagation.dir/MultimodePropagation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MMPropagation.dir/LawsonRK.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MMPropagation.dir/RungeKutta.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MMPropagation.dir/Nonlinearity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MMPropagation.dir/ComplexArray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MMPropagation.dir/Sparse3DMatrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MMPropagation.dir/DiscreteFourierTransform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MMPropagation.dir/readMatFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MMPropagation.dir/writeMatFile.cpp.o
